summary: Ship gate passes. R-1 is resolved: lines 46-49 unambiguously require CSP filtering before `isProfile` on load and before `validateProfileEntry` on import; lines 57-58 mandate end-to-end tests through `parseStoredState` and `parseImport`, including no reset/rejection, preservation of supported modifications and profile metadata, and no CSP import notice. The Round 2 scan found no new critical or high issues introduced by these updates.
triage: Clean verdict: note it in your report and COMMIT this artifact with the next bookkeeping commit.
